scripts.test:session: echo session-policy && tsx -e "import assert from 'node:assert/strict'; import { isSameOriginMutation, validToken } from './lib/web-session.ts'; assert.equal(validToken('abc', 3), true); const same = new Request('https://suqnaa.com/api/state', { method: 'POST', headers: { origin: 'https://suqnaa.com' } }); assert.equal(isSameOriginMutation(same, true), true); const missing = new Request('https://suqnaa.com/api/state', { method: 'POST' }); assert.equal(isSameOriginMutation(missing, true), false);" && echo route-policy && tsx lib/protected-route-policy.test.ts && echo browser-transport && tsx lib/authed-api.test.ts && echo seller-listings && tsx lib/listing-api.test.ts && echo listing-media-manager && tsx lib/listing-media-manager-surface.test.ts && echo conversations && tsx lib/conversation-api.test.ts && echo public-catalog && tsx lib/public-listing-api.test.ts && echo catalog-filter-surface && tsx lib/catalog-filter-surface.test.ts && echo buyer-proposals && tsx lib/trading-api.test.ts && echo marketplace-activity && tsx lib/offer-workflow-api.test.ts && echo checkout-preparation && tsx lib/payment-api.test.ts && echo checkout-presentation && tsx lib/checkout-presentation.test.ts && echo activity-details && tsx lib/order-activity-api.test.ts && echo order-cancellation-transport && tsx lib/order-cancellation-api.test.ts && echo order-cancellation-presentation && tsx lib/order-cancellation-presentation.test.ts && echo order-cancellation-surface && tsx lib/order-cancellation-surface.test.ts && echo fulfilment-transport && tsx lib/order-fulfilment-api.test.ts && echo fulfilment-presentation && tsx lib/order-fulfilment-presentation.test.ts && echo fulfilment-policy && tsx lib/order-fulfilment-policy.test.ts && echo fulfilment-surface && tsx lib/order-fulfilment-surface.test.ts && echo operations-api && tsx lib/operations-api.test.ts
